this_issue: A new cohort of **Beyond the Prompt** opens May 12. Four seats remain. New notes on the second book. A photograph from the road.

rows.title: Beyond the Prompt
rows.notes: An extension of the newsletter. From basic prompting to automated agentic workflows. First cohort starts May 12, 2026.

rows.title: Ten:Ten
rows.notes: Small volume. High standards. A practice for the patient.

rows.title: Memoir of a Machine
rows.notes: A prequel of sorts to Human Traits. First draft in the first half of the year; publishing later in 2026.

rows.title: A Return to Analog
rows.notes: A vinyl collection and management service. Notes from the listening room.
